# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD for pull requests
on: 
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize]   # Pull request events to be watched on changes in the repository that opened a PR or had their base changed. Here we only want new and updated branches (synchronizes), as older pr information might not contain all necessary data for testing purposes. 
jobs:   
# The job runs each workflow run when one is triggered by an event, here it's whenever there are changes to the PR branch  
  ${{ matrix.os }}-${{ matrix.node-version }} :      # This builds a node version combination that we define in our GitHub Action runner image 
    uses: ./.github/actions       # Define where your action runners store their cached artifacts, here it' is stored under the '.github'/ ' actions folder'. You can change this.  
...           // Keep remaining file as per requirement and do not modify above lines
